creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Guillermo,

no worries, seems all good now. 

So we have two important pieces of information:

1. putty crashes before any configuration is made

2. we have a useful backtrace.

So, can you start putty from console and see if there is any console output before it crashes? Gtk/Gdk logging, warnings, criticals?  If so, please paste them here.
